pages.text: The $(item:magic_storage:storage_core) is the heart of every Magic Storage network. It holds all stored item data, tracks connected blocks, and manages energy pools.$(br2)$(thing)One Core per network only.$()

The Core stores network items as $(thing)ItemKey$() entries - each unique component variant uses one type slot with long-count capacity.$(br2)It also owns all $(l:magic_storage:energy_overview)energy pools$() and nine persistent station/tool equipment slots. Equipment does not consume Storage Unit type capacity.

$(thing)Breaking the Core:$() With the correct tool, its drop carries inventory, energy, installed stations/tools, and Core identity. Replacing that same item restores them anywhere.$(br2)A blank Core never inherits previous data. If the data-carrying drop is destroyed, its contents cannot be recovered.$(br2)$(thing)Strength:$() 3.0 | $(thing)Blast Resistance:$() 6.0$(br)$(thing)Requires correct tool$() for drops.
